snapshot.notes: Official Frontiers pages show Original Research, Systematic Review/Review, Hypothesis and Theory, and Brief Research Report as accepted article types for this journal family. The author-guidelines page points authors to the article-type word-count limits and recommends full section structure for Original Research. Operational fit rule: keep bounded translation below primary-target readiness.

task_ledger.label: Resolve the lead contradiction or evidence tension
task_ledger.rationale: The current lane still carries a material blocker: Barrier readouts can improve in tissue without reducing leakage or downstream inflammatory spillover

task_ledger.execution_note: Generated translational strengthening brief from the linked Phase 4 packet.
